prompt: A surreal still-life in a dark black void, staged like a moody luxury sculpture display under a single soft spotlight. At the center, a large floating sphere dominates the composition, about one-third of the frame height, with a glossy translucent surface textured like swirling clouds and planetary gas bands in muted teal, cream, gray, and pale gold. Beneath and around the sphere sits an organic mound of dense mossy foliage and coral-like plant forms in olive green and bronze, mixed with a cluster of tiny luminous white-violet flowers on the left and a brighter white floral cluster on the right. Behind the sphere are 2 horizontal rectangular slabs suspended in space: 1 dark smoky slab on the left, partially hidden, and 1 larger warm brown-and-gold marbled slab on the right with vein-like lightning patterns. In the lower right foreground is 1 polished rectangular stone block resting on the ground, colored black, gray, and white with dramatic marble veining. The ground is a smooth matte surface with a pale green elliptical pool of light fading into darkness. Cinematic fine-art product photography style, surreal contemporary installation, minimal composition, strong negative space, soft bloom, subtle film grain, low-key lighting, glossy and mineral textures, slightly vintage color grading, high contrast but gentle focus, elegant and mysterious atmosphere.
